title: Learning Support Fund guidance
body: "The Learning Support Fund gives information about allowances for eligible students on pre-registration healthcare programmes on or after 1 August of each academic year.  The fund is available to eligible students on pre-registration courses in:   nursing midwifery most allied health professions dental hygiene or dental therapy   From the 2025 to 2026 academic year, the following new and continuing students will be able to access the Travel and Dual Accommodation Expenses (TDAE) provision of the scheme:   undergraduate pharmacy pre-registration healthcare science   "

taxons.title: Careers in health and social care
